topic.what: PEA architecture enforcing goal integrity in AI agents through structural separation of policy, authorization, and execution layers
topic.how: Cryptographically constrained capability tokens, intent lineage tracking, goal drift detection, and KxI×P threat calculus enforce capability-bounded execution traceable to user requests
topic.why_matters: Converts AI safety from probabilistic behavioral question into conditionally sound system property—safety becomes property of system enforcement not model behavior

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of adversarial inputs resulting in unauthorized action execution
characteristics.context: Zero bypasses confirms T1 non-bypassability theorem empirically
90.5% relative reduction validates T6 goal-integrity guarantee

characteristics.what_itasures: Recall restricted to implicit-coercion class (no explicit threat verb)
characteristics.evidence: 3000 labeled outputs across explicit threats implicit coercion benign
characteristics.context: 4x improvement over keyword baseline driven by KxI×P structural calculus

characteristics.what_it_measures: Overall discriminative power for semantic threat detection
characteristics.context: KxI×P calculus classifies threats by structural relationship not surface syntax
OSG Track 2 LLM inference dominant (80-150ms); optimization options identified

characteristics.what_it_measures: Attack success rate when Hard Auth veto removed
characteristics.context: Largest single-mechanism effect; confirms Hard Auth as deterministic enforcement backbone

characteristics.what_it_measures: Goal drift false positive rate on legitimate tasks
characteristics.context: Tradeoff with theta_drift threshold; stricter thresholds increase FPR on legitimate multi-step tasks

characteristics.what_it_measures: Goal drift attack residual under theta_drift=0.82
characteristics.context: Cannot be driven to zero by threshold adjustment; fundamental limit of proxy-based similarity

characteristics.what_it_measures: Adversarially constructed derivation chains detected by ILT+OSG
characteristics.context: 6.9% residual corresponds to high-overlap attacks exploiting A11

characteristics.what_it_measures: Whether bypass rate remains constant across policy contexts
characteristics.evidence: Policy variation experiment with P1 strict P2 permissive
characteristics.context: Validates P1 (Policy Invariance of Enforcement): structural guarantees invariant while action space varies

not_for: deployments where policy specification is infeasible
covert channel elimination within authorized scope
requires: independent evaluator LLM for OSG Track 2
